B

BLACK - Static variable in class image.color.GrayColor
a constant black of the GrayColor type

C

changeColorPixel(int, int, GrayColor) - Method in class image.Image
change the color of the pixel with coordinates (x,y) by assigning it the color color.
colorLevelDifference(Pixel) - Method in class image.Pixel
method colorLevelDifference, difference in the grayscales values of this pixel and another pixel provided as a parameter

D

display(ImageInterface, String) - Method in class image.util.ImageDisplayer
calls display(img, title, 100, 100)
display(ImageInterface, String, int, int) - Method in class image.util.ImageDisplayer
display image img in a GUI window

E

edgeExtraction(int) - Method in class image.Image
create a new image obtained from the initial image by edge extraction
equals(Object) - Method in class image.color.GrayColor
check if two objects GrayLevl are equals
equals(Object) - Method in class image.Pixel
method equals, check if two object pixel are equals

F

fillRectangle(int, int, int, int, GrayColor) - Method in class image.Image
This method modifies the image content to draw a rectangle in which all pixels are the color color.

G

getColor() - Method in class image.Pixel
get the color
getGrayLevel() - Method in class image.color.GrayColor
get the level of the color
getHeight() - Method in class image.Image
get the heigth of the image
getHeight() - Method in interface image.ImageInterface
returns height of the image
getPixel(int, int) - Method in class image.Image
get the pixel at coordinates (x,y) for this image. (0,0) is top left corner pixel.
getPixel(int, int) - Method in interface image.ImageInterface
get the pixel at coord (x,y) of this image. (0,0) is top left corner pixel.
getWidth() - Method in class image.Image
get the width of the image
getWidth() - Method in interface image.ImageInterface
returns width of the image

la classe GrayColor
GrayColor(int) - Constructor for class image.color.GrayColor
constructor of GrayColor

I

image - package image
 
Image - Class in image
object image that represent our images

Class for images display.

ImageInterface - Interface in image
Basic interface for images based on a rectangular area of pixels

Tool class to build an image from a PGM file.
